intents.text: Ensure the ID is included in the correct format when sent.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: include the id in the right format

intents.text: When selecting a preset, stay in basic mode visually but show it as selected instead of jumping to advanced mode.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: stay in 'basic' mode but with that selected

intents.text: The correct data should still be sent, and clicking into Advanced should show those preset settings populated.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: send the right data tho - and if i click into Advanced those settings will be there
